Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0846 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Boulder Dash 16 (J1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $9000 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $7968 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Boulder Dash 16 (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The existing routine at $7968 has been used simply to set the border and screen colour to black before hitting the true entry point at $0846
